opinion.h4: ROSS v. CALIFORNIA. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 798, Misc. Decided May 27, 1968.
opinion.p: Thomas C. Lynch, Attorney General of California, William E. James, Assistant Attorney General, and Walter R. Jones, Deputy Attorney General, for respondent.

The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis and the petition for a writ of certiorari are granted. The judgment is reversed. Chapman v. California, 386 U.S. 18, and Anderson v. Nelson, 390 U.S. 523.
MR. JUSTICE BLACK is of the opinion that certiorari should be denied.
